problem.title: LiTAMIN2 pure-odometry (no GT seed) on KITTI Raw drive 0009 (full)
problem.question: Does LiTAMIN2 hold up on KITTI Raw 0009 full as standalone odometry (Policy B), to match the paper-reported KITTI Odometry methodology?

variants.label: Fast local-map + covariance (no GT seed)
variants.intent: Repository default profile measured as pure odometry to match paper-style evaluation.

variants.label: Fast local-map + ICP-only (no GT seed)
variants.intent: Disable covariance-shape term and run as pure odometry.

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + covariance (no GT seed)
variants.intent: Paper-like 3m local map measured as pure odometry.

variants.label: Paper-like 3m + ICP-only (no GT seed)
variants.intent: Paper profile without covariance cost, pure odometry.
